---
title: "Tier 6 — Undergraduate Advanced"
subtitle: "Years 3–4 · planned, not yet built"
---

::: {.callout-note}
This tier is **planned but not yet authored.** See [`_curriculum.yml`](/_curriculum.yml)
for the topic plan and the [Home page](/index.qmd) for build status.
:::

## Planned scope

Abstract algebra (groups, rings, fields) · complex analysis · numerical
methods · ordinary and partial differential equations · optimisation
(convex, gradient methods) · graph theory · information theory · Fourier
analysis.

[← Back to Home](/index.qmd)
